title: Better Anchors
description: A texture pack that makes charged and uncharged Respawn Anchors instantly distinguishable for Crystal PvP.
body:
# Better Anchors
Better Anchors is a resource pack that improves the visibility of respawn anchors, making it much easier to tell whether an anchor is charged or uncharged at a glance.
## Features
- Clearly distinguishes charged and uncharged respawn anchors
- Bright white texture for uncharged anchors
- Bright red texture for charged anchors
- Helps players react faster in crystal PvP
## **Why use this pack?**
In fast-paced crystal PvP, quickly identifying whether a respawn anchor is loaded is crucial. By using highly contrasting colors, this pack makes anchor states instantly recognizable, allowing players to make faster and more accurate decisions.
